name: Viridian Therapeutics, Inc.DE
business: Viridian Therapeutics is a biopharmaceutical company focused on discovering, developing, and commercializing potential best-in-class medicines for serious and rare diseases, primarily targeting autoimmune and rare diseases. Their pipeline includes product candidates for thyroid eye disease (TED), FcRn inhibitors for autoimmune disorders, and a TSHR inhibitor for Graves disease and TED. They are pre-revenue and preparing for the potential launch of veligrotug (IV) and elegrobart (subcutaneous) for TED.

exposures.sentence: We are a biopharmaceutical company focused on discovering, developing, and commercializing potential best-in-class medicines for serious and rare diseases.

catalysts.event: PDUFA target action date for veligrotug BLA
catalysts.sentence: We submitted a BLA for veligrotug to the FDA in October 2025, which was accepted for filing and granted Priority Review in December 2025 with a PDUFA target action date of June 30, 2026.

catalysts.event: Topline data for REVEAL-1 phase 3 trial of elegrobart in active TED
catalysts.sentence: We anticipate topline data for REVEAL-1 in the first quarter of 2026 and REVEAL-2 in the second quarter of 2026.

catalysts.event: Topline data for REVEAL-2 phase 3 trial of elegrobart in chronic TED
catalysts.sentence: We anticipate topline data for REVEAL-1 in the first quarter of 2026 and REVEAL-2 in the second quarter of 2026.
We expect healthy volunteer data in the second half of 2026.
We anticipate submitting an IND for this program in the fourth quarter of 2026.

catalysts.event: Communicate future development plans for VRDN-006
catalysts.sentence: We expect to communicate future development plans for VRDN-006 in 2026.

tamClaims.claim: Approximately 190,000 TED patients in the United States with moderate to severe TED.
tamClaims.sentence: We estimate approximately 190,000 TED patients in the United States with moderate to severe TED, which includes patients with either active and chronic TED, and a similar epidemiology in Europe.

tamClaims.claim: Tepezza's 2025 net sales were approximately $1.9 billion.
tamClaims.sentence: Tepezza s 2025 net sales were approximately $1.9 billion with estimated single digit annual penetration of the addressable moderate to severe TED population.

tamClaims.claim: Efgartigimod net sales approximately $4.15 billion in 2025, projected to generate more than $9 billion by 2030.
tamClaims.sentence: Argenx reported preliminary efgartigimod net sales of approximately $4.15 billion in 2025, and it is projected to generate more than $9 billion in annual sales by 2030.

tamClaims.claim: Graves disease affects more than 2 million people in the United States.
tamClaims.sentence: Graves disease is one of the most prevalent autoimmune conditions, affecting more than 2 million people in the United States, and is the leading cause of hyperthyroidism.
